case_title: ST. CHARLES TOYOTA VS. ROBERT JETT

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JETT, ROBERT $2,452.97 PRINCIPAL, $271.80 INTEREST, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,828.77, TOTAL - $2,828.77 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
